cards.goal: Close the remaining G0 governance handoff by binding Package A activation to the product-owner-confirmed immutable manifest digest and preserving the exact required-check and capability boundaries.
inputs: authoritative main containing the accepted G0-T04 Package A manifest
product owner confirmation of the exact Package A payload_sha256
live read-only ruleset 19526291 readback matching the frozen evidence digest
outputs: machine-validated Package A activation record bound to the confirmed manifest digest
closed G0 status with G1-T01 as the only next not-authorized task
fresh-clone proof that governance history, ruleset identity, and capability ceiling did not drift
forbidden_scope: business, strategy, adapter, API, persistence, frontend, notification, or observability implementation
public or private market network access
credentials, accounts, orders, leverage, shorting, trading, paid resources, deployment, release, or LOCAL-PREVIEW
Package B, Package C, or Package D activation

triggers: manifest path, schema, generation, baseline, payload digest, first card, last card, ordered cards, or package state drift
missing or mismatched product owner digest confirmation
HEAD, base, parent order, tree, CI subject, ruleset, allowlist, or fresh-clone drift
unknown field, path, permission, dependency, network, secret, paid resource, deployment, release, or trading need

preconditions: Package A was activated by a prior product owner confirmation of this exact payload digest
G0-T05 is closed on authoritative main after exact-head candidate, closure, merged-main, and finalization CI success
independent code/security is APPROVE and architecture/route is CLEAR
ordered parents, tree, ruleset, allowlist, manifest digest, and fresh-clone readback have no drift
G1-T01 authorization is created as a new serial task and no other task is active

stop_conditions: stop after G0-T05 delivery while awaiting review
stop on any non-green review or CI result and return only G0-T05
stop before G1-T01 if Package A is not active or any continuation precondition is absent
stop before any cross-package, G2+, network, credential, trading, deployment, or release action

cards.goal: Establish one reproducible, cross-platform, full non-transport CI entrypoint with pinned Python and Node dependency identities and fail-closed governance, fixture, type, build, secret, and forbidden-scope checks.
inputs: the activated Package A manifest with unchanged payload digest
the existing G0 / exact-head trust anchor and ruleset 19526291 readback
outputs: one documented local and CI verification entrypoint using pinned runtime and dependency identities
full non-transport Python, frontend, fixture digest, type, build, dependency, secret, and forbidden-scope checks under the stable aggregate required-check context
cross-platform reproducibility evidence from clean environments with no product capability increase
forbidden_scope: business, strategy, adapter, API behavior, persistence, frontend behavior, notification, or observability implementation
public or private market network access
credentials, accounts, orders, leverage, shorting, trading, paid resources, deployment, release, or LOCAL-PREVIEW
G2 implementation or Package B, Package C, or Package D activation

triggers: manifest digest, activated-package identity, G0-T05 close, runtime pin, dependency lock, fixture digest, command set, or required-check context drift
platform-dependent pass, skipped required suite, unpinned dependency, network fallback, or non-deterministic generated output
HEAD, base, parent order, tree, CI subject, ruleset, allowlist, or fresh-clone drift
unknown field, path, permission, dependency, network, secret, paid resource, deployment, release, or trading need

preconditions: no continuation is permitted because G1-T01 is the last Package A card
a separately planned and explicitly authorized package is required for any later card

stop_conditions: stop after G1-T01 delivery while awaiting review
stop on any non-green review or CI result and return only G1-T01
stop after G1-T01 final acceptance and Package A close
stop before any G2+, cross-package, market network, credential, trading, deployment, or release action
